signals.headline: Drift Protocol Hack on Solana (April 1) Resolved with $280M Loss | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Drift Protocol Hack on Solana (April 1) Resolved with $280M Loss | YES | MED confidence**  
Solana-based DeFi platform Drift Protocol suffered a $280M hack on April 1 via social engineering on security council members, now confirmed as resolved loss[6]. This could shift prediction markets on Solana DeFi risks despite network highs.

South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2.2% YoY (vs. 2.4% Expected), Undershooting Forecasts Amid Iran War Oil Pressures | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][2]
